meaning: n.叽哩呱啦言语v.把莫名其妙的事叽叽喳喳地讲,喋喋而言
examples: The Cravens Peak protects unique red sandy dune fields gibber plains semi-permanent waterholes and Coolabah woodlands.
The Cravens Peak protects unique red sandy dune fields, gibber plains, semi-permanent waterholes and Coolabah woodlands.
And the ocean turned out to gibber rather than murmur.
